economic_notes: Nation has three commercial enterprises: Marble Canyon Forestry Ltd., 0436158 B.C. Ltd., and Ts'kw'aylaxw Forest Co. Ltd. Also holds investments in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing. Significant gaming revenue held in restricted trust. Economic dependence on ISC Comprehensive Funding Arrangement noted.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Auditor report dated October 23, 2023 — over 18 months after year end, which is unusual. Three GBEs (Marble Canyon Forestry Ltd., 0436158 B.C. Ltd., Ts'kw'aylaxw Forest Co. Ltd.) consolidated on modified equity basis. Total government transfers estimated as ISC $4,059,039 + Province of BC $467,689 + CMHC $81,128 + FNHSA $632,648 + FNESC $45,449 + BC Hydro $93,167 (treated as government entity transfer) = $5,379,120; OSR calculated accordingly. Housing expenses include both Housing ($131,787) and Social Housing ($146,722). No schedule of remuneration provided. Line of credit balance of $210,000 outstanding at year end secured against ISC funding.
